title: Testing, Release Gates, and Memory Incident Defense · Stakeholder Native Systems Mission
summary: An engineering, security, accessibility, operations, and reliability review board. The board needs complementary compiler, sanitizer, analyzer, fuzz, resource, ABI, concurrency, load, allocator, hardening, canary, rollback, and incident evidence for an immutable native release. Planned artifact: Deliver Native Memory-Safety Production Defense with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-c…
objectives: Build and run representative tests with AddressSanitizer and LeakSanitizer, symbols, fatal findings, and supported-target notes.
Run Clang and GCC static analyzers, preserve paths and assumptions, classify findings, and regression-test repairs.
Build a deterministic libFuzzer target with bounded input, sanitizer instrumentation, corpus, dictionary, timeout, and minimized regressions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Commit to the mission model · Project Asan Lsan Evidence
steps.instruction:
project case — A project native-systems team handles memory case 7607. Produce bounded C evidence to decide release readiness from complementary memory evidence; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Build and run representative tests with AddressSanitizer and LeakSanitizer, symbols, fatal findings, and supported-target notes.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Commit to the mission model · Project Asan Lsan Evidence.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for build and run representative tests with addresssanitizer and leaksanitizer, symbols, fatal findings, and supported-target notes. For Commit to the mission model · Project Asan Lsan Evidence, keep Asan Lsan Evidence connected to executable C memory invariant and explicit native transfer evidence.
